params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Kitchen (Taste). Focus tightly on: kitchen cabinets, range hood, kitchen island or counter, deep green vertical tile backsplash, walnut cabinetry and minimal brass hardware, marble/honed counter vignette (cutting board, small herb), under-cabinet warm strip lighting, walnut cabinet faces with minimal brass hardware, marble or honed stone counter vignette (cutting board, ceramics). Styled in mid_century aesthetic, earthy palette, soft_ambient lighting. A warm, layered mid‑century inspired home with an earthy palette anchored in emerald greens, reclaimed walnut, brass accents and tactile woven surfaces. The overall direction is calm and artistic — think botanical spa meets curated gallery: lush plants, handcrafted textures, and intentional pops of warm terracotta and ochre. Light should feel soft and directional from existing windows, sculpting materials rather than flattening them. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
